description: Inspired by the adiZero shoe, the adiZero Slides by adidas have a streamlined upper for a lightning-fast look. These men's athletic slides are light and comfortable, enhanced with a Supercloud footbed which is quick drying for maximum comfort in or out of the shower. If you need to look stylish when you're hanging out by the pool this summer, grab these sandals and enjoy the easy comfort of these hot weather essentials.UpperPadded synthetic strap across forefootAdjustable velcro fastening for a customised FitComfortable, soft, Supercloud footbedOutsoleLightweight, flexible outsole with texture and grooves to give good grip on wet surfacesSandal careUse a cloth to remove dust and dirt
